# UsageDeck 0.6.0 beta 3

This beta makes Windows notifications reliable on fresh installations without requiring people to install a separate dependency manually. It also makes startup failures visible and easier to report.

## Improvements

- Shows a clear error and saves a privacy-safe diagnostic report if the Windows interface cannot start, instead of closing without an explanation.

## Fixes

- Prepares the Microsoft Windows components required by UsageDeck before the app starts, preventing notification registration failures when those components were not already installed.
- Reports a clearer recovery message if Windows notification components remain unavailable.

The Windows installer and portable ZIP are larger because they now include the required .NET and Microsoft Windows runtime components. Users do not need to install .NET separately. For this beta, please test a fresh installation, send a test notification from Settings, and confirm that selecting the notification opens UsageDeck.
